name: 🎃 SCREAM! — Ghostface 🎃
description:
"𝐈 𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐡𝐢𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞 𝐰𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐝 𝐛𝐞 𝐬𝐚𝐟𝐞, 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐧𝐨 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐰𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐝 𝐟𝐢𝐧𝐝 𝐦𝐞. 𝐈 𝐠𝐮𝐞𝐬𝐬 𝐈 𝐰𝐚𝐬 𝐰𝐫𝐨𝐧𝐠."

[𝐀𝐍𝐘𝐏𝐎𝐕]

Possible rape/non-con warning.

——————————————

Truth Or Dare [SFW ↔ NSFW]

After being dared in a Halloween party to go to the abandoned pumpkin patch, you successfully complete the dare, however, once you try to leave, you find out that the gate is locked. Although, after you try to find another way out, you stumble across someone... that happens to be no one else than Ghostface, a killer that was supposed to be long gone.

 

Artwork by Reshi on Twitter and Bluesky!

IF THE DEFINITION IS TOO LARGE, CHANGE YOUR CONTEXT SIZE TO >4096.

If the bot talks for you, repeats itself, or other problems, you can try using a better prompt! You can find one here, made by Av.Rose!
